phrases.text_local: Quelle est l'atmosphère de la Vieille Ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah-tos-FAIR duh lah vyay VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Lausanne's Old Town (Cité) is perched on a hill above the lake — narrow streets, medieval buildings, and spectacular views. The cathedral is the spiritual heart.

responses.english: Visit the cathedral and old Lausanne.
responses.local: Visitez la cathédrale et le vieux Lausanne.

phrases.cultural_note: The Cité is built on a steep hill. Wear comfortable shoes — some streets have stairs rather than sidewalks. The metro (M2) helps with vertical transport.

responses.english: Yes, the streets are very steep here.
responses.local: Oui, le quartier est en pente. Il est connu pour ses nombreux escaliers publics, donc des chaussures confortables sont recommandées.

phrases.cultural_note: Lausanne Cathedral sits at the highest point of the Cité. At 10pm, the night watchman appears to call the hours — a unique tradition.

responses.english: The cathedral is up above, in the heart of the Cité.
responses.phonetic: lah kah-tay-DRAL eh ahn oh, oh kur duh lah see-TAY
responses.local: La cathédrale est en haut, au cœur de la Cité.

phrases.cultural_note: The Cité has traditional Swiss restaurants, cozy cafés, and wine bars. Try the local wines from the Lavaux vineyards.

responses.english: Try traditional cafes like Café Romand or fondue restaurants.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn plu-ZYUR dahn luh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Essayez les cafés traditionnels comme Café Romand ou les restaurants de fondue.
